title: Mildly Minty Mediterranean Green Pepper Bake
description: A flavorful, fluffy Mediterranean dish perfect for hangover relief. Green peppers are marinated in a mixture of olive oil, lemon juice, and herbs before being baked in a ramekin.

ingredients.name: green peppers, large
ingredients.notes: any color green pepper will do

ingredients.name: olive oil
ingredients.notes: use a high-quality extra-virgin olive oil

ingredients.name: fresh mint leaves
ingredients.notes: chop the leaves finely before adding

instructions: Cut the green peppers in half and remove the seeds and membranes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the olive oil, lemon juice, oregano, thyme, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Place the green peppers in a ramekin and brush the marinade all over them.
Top each pepper with a sprinkle of feta cheese and a few chopped fresh mint leaves.
Cover the ramekin with aluminum foil and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the peppers are tender and lightly browned.
Serve the peppers hot, garnished with additional fresh mint leaves if desired.
